description_long: This is a medium-sized, hardcover book with a deep purple cover and a slightly rounded top-right corner. The front cover features a centered, ornate white label bordered with a dotted line, giving it a classic, formal appearance. A small yellow bookmark or ribbon is visible at the top right, adding a touch of contrast and functionality. The spine is a golden yellow color with bold black text running vertically, making the title easily readable when shelved. The back cover is plain purple with a small, centered orange and white box-shaped logo. The book appears to be well-bound, with a thickness suggesting a moderate page count.
description: A hardcover book with a purple cover, ornate white label, and a yellow spine featuring bold vertical text. The back has a small orange logo and the top right corner is rounded.
description_view_0: The front cover is visible, showing a purple background, ornate white label, and a yellow bookmark at the top right.
description_view_1: A thin, edge-on view showing the white pages and the book's thickness.
description_view_2: The back cover is plain purple with a small, centered orange and white logo.
description_view_3: The yellow spine is visible with bold black vertical text and a small publisher mark at the bottom.
attribute_spine_design: The spine is golden yellow with bold black text running vertically, displaying the book's title. There is a small publisher mark at the bottom of the spine.
attribute_publisher_logo: A small, orange and white box-shaped logo is centered on the back cover.
